title: First name exceeds maximum allowed length
preconditions: User is on the registration page.
test_steps: Enter first name: (a string of 51 characters, e.g., 'Aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa')
expected_results: An inline error message appears stating that the first name exceeds the maximum allowed length.

title: Last name exceeds maximum allowed length
preconditions: User is on the registration page.
test_steps: Enter last name: (a string of 51 characters, e.g., 'Bbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbb')
expected_results: An inline error message appears stating that the last name exceeds the maximum allowed length.

title: Username exceeds maximum allowed length
preconditions: User is on the registration page.
test_steps: Enter username: (a string of 31 characters, e.g., 'abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz12345')
expected_results: An inline error message appears stating that the username exceeds the maximum allowed length.

title: Account lockout after multiple failed login attempts
preconditions: A registered user account exists with valid credentials.
The system enforces an account lockout policy after a certain number of failed login attempts (e.g., 3).
test_steps: Enter registered email and an incorrect password. Repeat this step 3 times.
On the 4th attempt, enter the same incorrect password.
expected_results: After the 3rd failed attempt, the system displays a warning about remaining attempts.

On the 4th failed attempt (or after exceeding the limit), the account is locked and an error message appears stating that the account is temporarily locked due to too many failed attempts. The user is unable to log in even with correct credentials until the lockout period expires.
